'''âm-dh-ng-p''' ('''kamadhngepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hemodialyse|hemodialyse]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-dh-ng-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hemodialyse|hemodialyse]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-dh-ng-p
|-
! Lemma
| kamadhngepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimadhngepoko|thimadhngepoko]] || [[word:jimadhngepoko|jimadhngepoko]] || [[word:shimadhngepoko|shimadhngepoko]] || [[word:kimadhngepoko|kimadhngepoko]]
|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
